summary: protocol.json defines global required_fields incl. evidence, but multiple ledger entries omit evidence; enforcement appears advisory (prompt-only), not validated by launcher.

findings.issue: Ledger entries violate protocol.json required_fields (missing evidence)
findings.details: protocol.json requires evidence for all collab ledger events, but every reviews.jsonl entry omits evidence; additionally one consensus and one broadcast omit evidence.

findings.issue: required_fields appears global, but launcher prompt only explicitly enforces it for proposals
findings.details: Commander prompt explicitly says “Publish a proposal early … using required fields …” but does not explicitly require the same fields for peer_review/improvement/consensus/broadcast entries, consistent with observed missing evidence in reviews and some other ledgers.

findings.issue: No documented/implemented enforcement of required_fields in launcher; appears advisory
findings.details: stampede.sh writes protocol.json (including required_fields) and creates ledgers, but no validation of appended JSONL records against required_fields is present in the launcher sections reviewed; compliance relies on agent adherence to prompt guidance.
